ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packets" (
  "packet_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each packet */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the packet (e.g., Play, Game) */,
  "bound_to" TEXT /* Destination of the packet (e.g., Client, Server) */,
  "packet_data" TEXT /* Actual packet data (binary format) */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet in bytes */,
  "protocol_version" TEXT /* Version of the protocol used for transmission */,
  "transmission_protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used for transmission (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "packet_id" TEXT /* ID of the packet the field belongs to */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field (e.g., Entity ID, Gamemode) */,
  "field_type" TEXT /* Data type of the field (e.g., Int, Unsigned Byte) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the field */,
  "field_length" INTEGER /* Length of the field in bytes */,
  "field_format" TEXT /* Format of the field (e.g., decimal, hexadecimal) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_fields_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode (e.g., Survival, Creative) */,
  "dimension" TEXT /* Game dimension (e.g., Nether, Overworld) */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Game difficulty (e.g., peaceful, hard) */,
  "map_size" INTEGER /* Size of the game map */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "mode_type" TEXT /* Type of game mode (e.g., PVP, PVE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dimensions" (
  "dimension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dimension */,
  "dimension_name" TEXT /* Name of the dimension */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dimension */,
  "dimension_type" TEXT /* Type of dimension (e.g., hellish, mystical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dimension_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "difficulties" (
  "difficulty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each difficulty */,
  "difficulty_name" TEXT /* Name of the difficulty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the difficulty */,
  "difficulty_level" INTEGER /* Level of difficulty (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("difficulty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the player */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the player joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game session */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the session belongs to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who started the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session */,
  "session_length" INTEGER /* Length of the session in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_sessions_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_transmissions" (
  "transmission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transmission */,
  "packet_id" TEXT /* ID of the packet being transmitted */,
  "transmission_time" TEXT /* Time of transmission */,
  "sender" TEXT /* Sender of the packet */,
  "receiver" TEXT /* Receiver of the packet */,
  "transmission_status" TEXT /* Status of the transmission (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transmission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_transmissions_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "role_type" TEXT /* Type of role (e.g., admin, moderator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player being assigned a role */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "permission_level" INTEGER /* Level of the permission (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics entry */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the analytics belong to */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who generated the analytics */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the analytics data */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the analytics data */,
  "gameplay_data" TEXT /* Actual analytics data (binary format) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the analytics data (e.g., JSON, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "packet_id" TEXT /* ID of the packet being transmitted */,
  "transmission_time" TEXT /* Time of transmission */,
  "latency" INTEGER /* Latency of the transmission in milliseconds */,
  "packet_loss" INTEGER /* Packet loss percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_performance_packet_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_id") REFERENCES packets ("packet_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "statistic_name" TEXT /* Name of the statistic (e.g., kills, deaths) */,
  "statistic_value" INTEGER /* Value of the statistic */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
